title: Royal Blue Silk Gudhi Vastra
description: Elevate your traditional celebrations with this exquisite Gudhi Vastra.
details: This sophisticated piece is crafted from premium royal blue fabric,featuring rich,intricate gold jari work that catches the light with a graceful shimmer.
The deep,rehal blue hue is perfectly complemented by the opulent golden border,which showcases traditionaal motifs,adding a touch of timeless elegance to your auspicious gudi padwa setup
Perfectly styled for the gudhi ,this vastra pairs beautifully with the traditional copper pot (kalash) and fresh floral garlands(gajra),creating a complete and visually stunning display.

title: Elegant Golden Geometric Gudhi Vastra
description: Enhance your Gudhi Padwa celebrations with this elegant Gudhi Vastra.
details: This traditional cloth is essential for adorning your Gudhi,symbolizing prosperity and auspicious beginnings.
The Gudhi Vastra features a classic, rich golden-yellow fabric adorned with a subtle, sophisticated geometric print in shades of brown and green.
The fabric is expertly pleated, allowing it to drape gracefully over the gudhi, creating a structured and traditional silhouette.
Whether for home pooja or festive display, this cloth brings a touch of authentic Maharashtrian heritage to your decor.
Add a touch of tradition and timeless grace to your home with this beautifully crafted Gudhi Vastra.

title: Traditional Gudhi Vastra with intricate Gold Brocade
description: Exquisite, all-over gold floral and geometric self-patterned brocade work, adding texture and luster.

It features a fitted neckband that sits perfectly beneath the copper vessel, with a subtle cutout or placket detail.
The pleats on this specific vastra, cascade elegantly towards the ornate floor rangoli.
